rows.label: xs33570100_MSG0010
rows.name:
If I'd known this would happen, I would've
brought at least a bottle with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33570100_MSG0020
rows.name:
The location is terrible, but right now even
cheap liquor would probably get me drunk[ST:wide ]—

rows.label: xs33570100_MSG0030
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—Whoa, you're alive! Hah! I figured as much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33570100_MSG0040
rows.name:
You've been through hell,
but you haven't broken yet, have you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33570100_MSG0050
rows.name:
Can't be helped. I'll tag along. Pushing ourselves
past our limits is part of the job, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33570100_MSG0060
rows.name:
Let's go for a drink when we get back.
Whoever contributes least is paying.[ST:wait ]
